app.name: RISALATECH
app.description: Generate professional motivation letters and recommendation letters instantly with AI. RISALATECH creates HR-compliant, professionally formatted documents from structured inputs — no prompt writing required.

landing.heroDesc: Generate professional motivation letters and recommendation letters instantly with AI. RISALATECH creates HR-compliant, professionally formatted documents from structured inputs — no prompt writing required.
landing.docSelectionTitle: What would you like to create?
landing.docSelectionDesc: Select a document type and our AI will help you generate a professional, HR-compliant output.
landing.docMotDesc: Generate professional cover letters tailored to your profile and the role you are applying for.
landing.docRecDesc: Create HR-compliant recommendation letters that highlight candidate strengths effectively.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need for professional HR documents
landing.featuresDesc: Our AI-powered platform handles the writing so you can focus on what matters.
landing.feature1Desc: Advanced AI creates professional documents tailored to your specific inputs — no templates or prompts needed.
landing.feature2Desc: All documents follow professional HR writing standards and formatting conventions used by recruiters.
landing.feature3Desc: Generate polished A4 PDF documents ready for submission with a single click.
landing.howItWorksTitle: Four simple steps to your professional document
landing.howItWorksDesc: No templates, no prompts — just fill in your details and let AI handle the rest.
landing.step1Desc: Select between a Motivation Letter or a Recommendation Letter to get started.
landing.step2Desc: Complete a structured form with your information — no writing skills required.
landing.step3Desc: Our AI processes your inputs and creates a professional, HR-compliant document.
landing.step4Desc: Preview, tweak, and download your document as a polished A4 PDF ready to share.
landing.faqDesc: Everything you need to know about RISALATECH.
landing.faqQ1: What types of documents can I generate?
landing.faqA1: You can generate professional Motivation Letters (cover letters) and Recommendation Letters. Both follow HR formatting standards and are tailored to your specific inputs.
landing.faqQ2: How does the AI generate documents?
landing.faqA2: Our AI uses structured form inputs — like your name, job title, skills, and experience — to craft a complete, well-written document. No prompt engineering or template editing is required from you.
landing.faqQ3: What formats are available for export?
landing.faqA3: Documents can be previewed in your browser and downloaded as A4-formatted PDF files. You can also copy the text directly to your clipboard.
landing.faqA4: Your data is processed securely and is not stored permanently unless you choose to save it. We do not share your information with third parties.
landing.faqQ5: Can I use the documents for real applications?
landing.faqA5: Yes! The documents are written following professional HR standards and are designed to be used for actual job applications and professional references.

newsletter.title: Stay Updated
newsletter.subtitle: Subscribe to receive product updates, new features and AI improvements.

motivation.title: Motivation Letter
motivation.subtitle: Fill in your details below to generate a professional cover letter.
motivation.noDocumentDesc: Fill in the form and click Generate to preview your motivation letter
motivation.tipsTitle: Tips for a Great Cover Letter
motivation.tip1: Be specific about the role and company you are applying to.
motivation.tip2: Highlight relevant skills and achievements that match the job description.
motivation.tip3: Use a professional tone — formal yet confident.
motivation.tip4: Keep it concise; one page is ideal for a cover letter.
motivation.tip5: Proofread carefully before submitting your application.
motivation.tip6: Customize each letter for the specific position.
motivation.expectDesc: The AI will use your details to write a complete motivation letter following professional HR standards. The result includes a subject line, salutation, body paragraphs highlighting your skills and experience, and a professional closing.
motivation.clubsSectionDesc: Extracurricular activities demonstrate leadership, initiative, and collaboration skills
motivation.clubNamePlaceholder: e.g. AI Club, Google Developer Group
motivation.responsibilitiesPlaceholder: Describe your main responsibilities and contributions...
motivation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

recommendation.title: Recommendation Letter
recommendation.subtitle: Create a professional recommendation letter for a colleague or team member.
recommendation.recommenderInfoDesc: Your details as the person writing the recommendation
recommendation.candidateInfoDesc: Details about the person being recommended
recommendation.noDocumentDesc: Fill in the form and click Generate to preview your recommendation letter
recommendation.tip1: Include specific examples of the candidate's achievements and contributions.
recommendation.tip2: Describe your working relationship clearly (supervisor, colleague, etc.).
recommendation.tip3: Be honest and authentic in your assessment of the candidate.
recommendation.tip4: Quantify results whenever possible (e.g. improved team productivity by 30%).
recommendation.tip5: Follow HR formatting standards for professional credibility.
recommendation.tip6: Mention soft skills alongside technical abilities for a balanced recommendation.
recommendation.expectDesc: The AI will generate a formal recommendation letter based on your inputs. The document includes a professional header, your relationship to the candidate, specific strengths and achievements, and a strong closing endorsement.

toast.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
